data.description: Themed bundle of 7 small upstream cmux issues that align with c11's documented Socket focus policy and CLI hygiene. Picks: #3098, #1418, #2839, #2984, #3129, #3065, #2951. Reporters to credit: @andy5090, @jasonkuhrt, @hummer98, @nengqi, @EtanHey, @austinywang, @shaun0927. Full rationale + per-pick credits in task note.
data.title: Upstream pull: CLI hygiene & focus policy (7 picks)

data.body: Phase 2 PR-status scan complete. Of the 7 picks: **2 have an open upstream PR** (#2839 → PR #2861 by @officialasishkumar, #2951 → PR #2954 by @shaun0927), and **5 have no fixing PR yet** (#3098, #1418, #2984, #3129, #3065). Full status: code/c11-private/upstream-watch/picks/2026-04-26-pr-status.md (C11-20 section).
